name: workflow-release-ready-check
default_program: [stages: preflight>detect>analyze>plan>review>handoff>audit | scope: repo|diff | policy: evidence,safety-gates,quality-gates{docs,release,tests,security},deterministic-output | lens: release-gatekeeper | output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: RELEASE_SCOPE
required_inputs.description: Release slice to judge after repository and hygiene gates are checked. Defaults to `repo` when omitted.

required_inputs.name: TARGET_BRANCHES
required_inputs.description: Branches involved in the release, such as source/dev and target/main.

required_inputs.name: HYGIENE_SCOPE
required_inputs.description: Scope for release hygiene checks. Defaults to `repo` when omitted.

required_inputs.name: REQUIRED_DOCS
required_inputs.description: Release-blocking docs that must be upgraded and kept public after the release.

required_inputs.name: LEGACY_PATTERNS
required_inputs.description: Legacy names or files that must not survive the release, including temporary implementation docs when they are delivery-only artifacts.

required_inputs.name: REMOTE_NAME
required_inputs.description: Remote expected to receive release refs when publish is likely to follow.

required_inputs.name: TAG_INTENT
required_inputs.description: Candidate version tag to check during repo and release review.

required_inputs.name: SURFACE_CONTRACTS
required_inputs.description: Public-surface contracts such as registry/docs parity or root README ownership.
